caption: A screen recording shows a web browser window displaying a complex causal loop diagram on a black background. The diagram features green text labels connected by blue and red arrows, including phrases such as "Birds Outside," "Attractiveness of Garden," "Bind more," "Present breakfast," "Frustration," "Bird Poop," and "Unsightly Goats." In the top right corner of the browser window, a small video inset shows a man with light skin and a dark baseball cap. In the first frame, the man is centered in the inset; as the sequence progresses, the inset window shifts slightly, and in the final frames, he is seen from a slightly different angle. The browser's address bar contains a URL from "dkleiner.de" and the window title reads "Trail & Learning by Systemdynamics, by Systemdynamics." The overall scene remains static except for the minor movement of the person in the small video window.
